name: part_005
file: tmp_【Sneak Peak】hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE Chromatic Future【#holoIDChromaticFuture 】 [GvDwA90OOuU]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_005.webm

scenes.description: MC section where Kobo Kanaeru, Vestia Zeta, and Kaela Kovalskia talk about the previous performance and interact with the audience.
Performance of the song 'Chromatic Future' by Hololive Indonesia Generation 1 and 2.

subtitles.original: Untuk lagu-lagunya santai, easy listening, jadi kita sambil keliling-keliling kan nyapa fans gitu ya?
subtitles.english: The songs are chill and easy listening, so we can walk around and greet the fans, right?

subtitles.original: Asyik banget ya tadi ya? Aku juga suka banget tadi dance bagian reff-nya ya.
subtitles.english: It was really fun, wasn't it? I also really liked the dance for the chorus part.

subtitles.original: Dala dala dala dala dala...
subtitles.english: Dala dala dala dala dala...

subtitles.original: Itu... itu beda lagu gak sih?
subtitles.english: Wait... isn't that a different song?

subtitles.original: Dala dala dala dala...
subtitles.english: Dala dala dala dala...

subtitles.original: Enggak gitu deh... gitu kayaknya...
subtitles.english: It's not like that... it's like this, I think...

subtitles.original: Ya, tapi pokoknya asyik lah ya kalau nyanyi lagu chill santai-santai kayak gini.
subtitles.english: Yeah, but anyway, it's fun to sing chill, relaxed songs like this.

subtitles.original: Iya, santai dong!
subtitles.english: Yeah, chill!

subtitles.original: Tapi ngomongin soal santai, kita tuh sebenarnya belum bisa santai dulu. Hei, santai!
subtitles.english: But speaking of chill, we actually can't relax just yet. Hey, relax!

subtitles.original: Karena katanya enggak boleh santai terus.
subtitles.english: Because they said we shouldn't keep relaxing.

subtitles.original: Iya iya iya, jangan santai-santai. Jangan terlalu santai.
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, yeah, don't relax. Don't be too relaxed.

subtitles.original: Karena konsernya tuh masih panjang!
subtitles.english: Because the concert is still long!

subtitles.original: Jadi sebelum itu, kalian ada gak yang mau kalian sampaikan dulu?
subtitles.english: So before that, do you guys have anything you want to say first?

subtitles.original: Mulai dari ini nih, gak bisa diam.
subtitles.english: Starting from this one who can't stay still.

subtitles.original: Tiga kata saja. I love you.
subtitles.english: Just three words. I love you.

subtitles.original: Keren. The best. Sangat jelas ya.
subtitles.english: Cool. The best. Very clear.

subtitles.original: Tetap semangat, tetap semangat menjalani hidup ya. Udah gitu aja. Pokoknya sampai akhir masih panjang. Semangat!
subtitles.english: Stay spirited, stay spirited in living life. That's all. Anyway, it's still long until the end. Spirit!

subtitles.original: 사랑해요! 고마워요!
subtitles.english: I love you! Thank you!

subtitles.original: Oke kalau aku... ya, semangat selalu! Semangat santai! Hidup jangan terlalu dibawa serius.
subtitles.english: As for me... yeah, always be spirited! Spirited chill! Don't take life too seriously.

subtitles.original: Semangat santai ya.
subtitles.english: Spirited chill.

subtitles.original: Semangat santai apa semangat santai?
subtitles.english: Spirited chill or spirited chill?

subtitles.original: Semangat santai.
subtitles.english: Spirited chill.

subtitles.original: Oke kalau gitu kita lanjutkan...
subtitles.english: Okay then, let's continue...

subtitles.original: Eits eits eits tunggu dulu! Sebelum selesai-selesai ini ya, kita teriak bareng-bareng penonton dulu gak sih?
subtitles.english: Wait, wait, wait, hold on! Before we wrap this up, how about we shout together with the audience?

subtitles.original: Iya dong! Ayo ayo ayo!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Let's go, let's go, let's go!

subtitles.original: Oke oke.
subtitles.english: Okay, okay.

subtitles.original: Jadi kita teriak bareng ya. Dalam hitungan tiga, kita sama-sama teriak Chromatic Future. Oke ya?
subtitles.english: So let's shout together. On the count of three, we'll shout "Chromatic Future" together. Okay?

subtitles.original: Chromatic Future! Chromatic Future gitu kan?
subtitles.english: Chromatic Future! Shout "Chromatic Future", right?

subtitles.original: Iya iya kayak gitu kayak gitu. Oke langsung ya, sambil lihat sini sini sini sambil lihat.
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, just like that. Okay, let's do it, while looking here, here, here...

subtitles.original: Aku ya, aku yang penonton ini nih, penonton sini nih!
subtitles.english: I'll take this audience here, the audience over here!

subtitles.original: Aku ini nih, yang tengah yang tengah. Halo!
subtitles.english: I'll take the ones in the middle. Hello!

subtitles.original: Oke bareng-bareng ya. Satu... dua... tiga!
subtitles.english: Okay, together now. One... two... three!

subtitles.original: CHROMATIC FUTURE!
subtitles.english: CHROMATIC FUTURE!

subtitles.original: Everything was easy, I did it all alone
subtitles.english: Everything was easy, I did it all alone

subtitles.original: So effortlessly, I spread my wings and let my magic unfold
subtitles.english: So effortlessly, I spread my wings and let my magic unfold

subtitles.original: Got all problems solved without any setbacks, there is nothing uncontrolled
subtitles.english: Got all problems solved without any setbacks, there is nothing uncontrolled

subtitles.original: There's no way I can begin, dream life that I need to win
subtitles.english: There's no way I can begin, dream life that I need to win

subtitles.original: I need to feel how all these things crumble into little pieces
subtitles.english: I need to feel how all these things crumble into little pieces

subtitles.original: I know I gotta soar a little higher, hope all turns to be the things I desire
subtitles.english: I know I gotta soar a little higher, hope all turns to be the things I desire

subtitles.original: Layaknya burung merak yang bersayap
subtitles.english: Just like a peacock with spreading wings

subtitles.original: Kan kutaklukkan gelap
subtitles.english: I will conquer the darkness

subtitles.original: Dengan sihir angin kan kuajak
subtitles.english: With the magic of the wind, I will invite

subtitles.english: All those who sleep to rise against the world

subtitles.original: We'll never give up, as long as we got the strength in ourselves
subtitles.english: We'll never give up, as long as we got the strength in ourselves

subtitles.original: We could rise above the pain, be stronger than that
subtitles.english: We could rise above the pain, be stronger than that

subtitles.original: Walking step by step, trusting my own pace
subtitles.english: Walking step by step, trusting my own pace

subtitles.original: Giving me what I deserve to have. Let's go!
subtitles.english: Giving me what I deserve to have. Let's go!

subtitles.original: Just believe me
subtitles.english: Just believe me

subtitles.original: Let it go, they'll never bring me down
subtitles.english: Let it go, they'll never bring me down

subtitles.original: Just believe me
subtitles.english: Just believe me

subtitles.original: Let it go, they'll never bring us down
subtitles.english: Let it go, they'll never bring us down

subtitles.original: Just believe me, I'm not their cruel tease, still am I royalty
subtitles.english: Just believe me, I'm not their cruel tease, still am I royalty

subtitles.english: And when the universe works against me I will just

subtitles.original: Let it go! If it's spicy just sip something let it go
subtitles.english: Let it go! If it's spicy just sip something let it go

subtitles.original: Let it go! If it's spicy just sip something let it go
subtitles.english: Let it go! If it's spicy just sip something let it go

subtitles.original: I've been living carefree, there's no bitter words in the world that could affect me
subtitles.english: I've been living carefree, there's no bitter words in the world that could affect me

subtitles.original: I spread my wings and let my magic unfold, not letting it show
subtitles.english: I spread my wings and let my magic unfold, not letting it show

subtitles.original: Things but I'm bigger than my feelings, so that will be enough
subtitles.english: Things but I'm bigger than my feelings, so that will be enough

subtitles.original: There's no way I can begin, dream life that I need to win
subtitles.english: There's no way I can begin, dream life that I need to win

subtitles.original: I need to feel how all these things crumble into little pieces
subtitles.english: I need to feel how all these things crumble into little pieces

subtitles.original: I know I gotta be better than ever, hope all turns to be sweeter than ever
subtitles.english: I know I gotta be better than ever, hope all turns to be sweeter than ever

subtitles.english: Just like a peacock with spreading wings, I will conquer the darkness
